title: Gemforged
description: Adds new gemstones and magical items!
body:
![Gemforged Title](https://i.imgur.com/DwrS0Rm.png)
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/KnTNF1K.png)
**Shadowstep Dagger**
- Shadowstep Dagger allows you to make 6 serial attacks, each one teleporting you around & keeping your aim on enemy.
- Nyxite & Dagger Template required to craft. Dagger Template generates in Ancient City with a 25% chance.

**Battle Charm**
- Battle Charm applies Garnet Rage to every player in a circle area. Garnet Rage increases attack speed, attack damage & speed.
- Bloodstone & Charm Template required to craft. Charm Template generates in Bastion Remnants with a 10% chance, 25% for treasure chests.

**Sandburst Staff**
- Sandburst Staff extremely pushes enemies & deals magic damage in the radius.
- Solarium & Staff Template required to craft. Staff Template generates in Desert Temples with a 10% chance.

**Venomfang Blade**
- Venomfang Blade pushes enemies & summons poison circle area on every 3rd hit. Poison circle transforms into Wither circle on 10th hits.
- Venomtyte & Blade Template required to craft. Blade Template generates in Jungle Temples with a 25% chance.

**Phoenix Charm**
- Phoenix Charm provides Phoenix Rebirth effect for a short duration, it saves your last location & health as backup. This effect prevents death for once by teleporting you back to your backup during the effect.
- Phoenixtone & Charm Template required to craft.

**Thunder Prism**
- Thunder Prism levitates, charges & summons lightning bolts on enemies when used.
- Prismyte & Prism Template required to craft. Prism Template generates in Cold Ocean Ruins in suspicious sands & gravels with a 25% chance.

**Gravity Horn**
- Gravity Horn creates an area strongly levitates enemies in the area.
- Gravitium & Horn Template required to craft. Horn Template generates in End Cities with a 25% chance.

**Verdant Totem**
- Verdant Totem levitates & provides regeneration to every ally in an area. After a few seconds, it stops spinning & explodes, providing everyone instant health.
- Verdantite & Totem Template required to craft. Totem Template generates in Pillager Outposts with a 25% chance.
